creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Michael Meiszl from comment #2)

> [root@l3router ~]# freebsd-version -u -k -r
> 13.2-RELEASE
> 13.2-RELEASE
> 13.1-RELEASE-p7

An outdated userland is typically the result of an incomplete upgrade. 

Did you follow the installation procedure that is documented at <https://www.freebsd.org/releases/13.2R/>? 

Or did you cut corners with chroot?
